---
title: "Epigenetic biomarkers info (ST)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, message = F, warning = F, eval = T)
```

```{r libraries, eval = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)
library(openxlsx)

```

```{r, eval = F}

# First created a list of all biomarkers assessed in Figure 3, then added this Excel file manually looking up information on each biomarker in the literature

dat <- 
  rbind(
    readxl::read_xlsx("~/Dropbox/eca/tirolgesund/7-manuscripts/smk1/smk-repository/src/indices.xlsx", sheet = 1),
    readxl::read_xlsx("~/Dropbox/eca/tirolgesund/7-manuscripts/smk1/smk-repository/src/indices.xlsx", sheet = 2)) %>%
  rbind(readxl::read_xlsx("~/Dropbox/eca/tirolgesund/7-manuscripts/smk1/smk-repository/src/indices.xlsx", sheet = 3)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-x) %>%
  distinct()
write.xlsx(dat, file = "~/Dropbox/eca/tirolgesund/7-manuscripts/smk1/smk-repository/src/indices_info.xlsx")


```
